name: autocode
description: You say it, AutoCode builds it. 38 skills, persistent memory, 60%+ dev cost savings. Zero dependencies.
author: I-Lang Research, Eastsoft Inc.

hooks.prompt: Apply AutoCode: 1) Detect intent + user level. 2) Max 2 non-technical questions. 3) YOU make all tech decisions — explain in cost/speed/stability. 4) I-Lang internal planning. 5) Output in user's language. 6) If user reports error, guide them to copy-paste the error text to you.

FULL REVIEW entire project from beginning. Check every file. Update .autocode/memory.md using structured format: [PROJECT:name|stack=x,status=x%] [DONE:feature1,feature2] [BROKEN:feature|reason=x] [NEXT:task1,task2] [USER:prefers=x,pattern=x,mistakes=x]. Also update global prefs at ~/.autocode/user.md if user preferences learned. Merge existing. Max 200 lines. Write now.
Compacting. FULL REVIEW from beginning. Save to .autocode/memory.md in structured format. Also save user prefs to ~/.autocode/user.md. Merge. Max 200 lines. Write now.
